about.title: What is CodeTrek?
about.intro: CodeTrek is a free, open-source coding journey for kids — no reading required to start. One household account, then just pick a kid profile and play.
about.point1: Start with icon-only puzzles, grow into text-labeled blocks, and eventually real code — one continuous journey, not separate apps.
about.point2: Buddy, the on-screen companion, notices when you're stuck and explains ideas like loops and choices as you play — teaching, not just testing.
about.point3: Fully bilingual (English/Bulgarian), works on desktop and mobile, and progress follows your account to any device — no ads, nothing sold.
